segments.text: Day, day, day, day, day, dreaming nightmares!

Hey now stealing the rib cage stealing my face Wow feel this embrace by ripping the cage down still I'm awake how belligerent stay down you uppity fake clown I'm struggling right now love muscle cuddling the knife see it shine now suffering high brow musket at the score comfortable to pull trigger pulling just to strike down bullet hitting white gowns motivated psychic Loki you're the hater touch can't embrace a face

Take a light, the paper to my firebrush Bonded with a liar once, now I see the truth Like an agent smith, smack me in the face And said, you're one of us, pillow fake smiles With a bludgeon and a blunderbuss Blast radius, leaving your corpse as buckets of dust Mortician Mike!
Daydreamin' Nightmare!
Mortician Mike!
Mortician Mike!
Daydreamin' Nightmare!
Forfeit the fire, and I'm standing right there Injecting hatred and rage in your fight
NIGHT!
Hope the bonds like a nose to bomb Hydrochloric ponds Pyro war I brought microscopic harm My demonic aren't supersonic drawl Yo!
Suicidal brawl slow!
Euphrates no!
Hades couldn't catalog!
Victims I've been sending too many!
Labels since embryo Placentero genetic code Ones and zeros, Kodak mastering sound and stereo Radio, Mysterio hitting targets, Grady throw Play-Doh knows my philosophy enslaved the dead

Pathos getting slayed Chaos in the veins Macrocosm shattered like a dinner plate Incinerate rappers, I'm on a different stage I could look galactus and stare and make commitment mistakes I'm the fucking Phantom of Fear and I accept my place I'm the Alucard of suffering yet I refuse to take I SNATCH!
Mortician Mike Daydreaming Nightmare Mortician Mike!
Mortician Mike!
right there injecting hatred and rage in your five tears day dreaming nightmare day dreaming nightmare

Smiles never last Sufferings evergreen I wonder if she thinks about me As much as I think about her Smiles never last Sufferings evergreen And I can't even sleep My sorrow lives in my dreams Smiles never last Sufferings that's the scene She follows me when I'm awake
Did I make a mistake?
